contract_claim: The Key architecture section omits all V1 unified Finding/Triage architecture modules (claim_builder.py, evidence.py, findings.py, findings_adapter.py, triage.py, triage_exec.py) which are significant parts of the codebase as documented in the root shadow doc and individual module shadows. [evidence: _root — "`src/osoji/findings.py` + `evidence.py` + `triage.py` + `triage_exec.py` + `claim_builder.py` define the canonical v1 types"]
observed_behavior: Add entries for the V1 architecture modules to the Key architecture list: findings.py (Unified Finding schema), evidence.py (Evidence schema), triage.py (Unified finding triage), triage_exec.py (Exploration tool executor), claim_builder.py (Debris claim builder), findings_adapter.py (Legacy-to-V1 finding adapter).
